subcodes.first_line: O twig of the Tree of Eternity! Through thee, the honored Áqa Mahmúd ʿAssar sent a letter and, in it, asked for permission to visit the Blessed House
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان شجره بقا جناب آقا محمود عصار مکتوبی بواسطه شما ارسال نمودند و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Shrines and Holy places, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @consolation and comfort
